notes: Level 7 manual review override shard for spell indexes 00-04 in generated discovery row order.
Arcane Sword had stale structured/runtime values; this shard closes the correction to canonical 3d10 Force damage and 20-foot bonus-action sword movement.

arcane-sword::choice_or_mode.issue: Choosing the attack target is represented by the DAMAGE effects and utility option.
arcane-sword::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.
arcane-sword::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE effects and UTILITY controlOptions.

arcane-sword::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The melee spell attack and repeat bonus-action attack are now represented as DAMAGE effects with spell attack filters.

arcane-sword::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The bonus-action repeat movement and attack are represented as on_caster_action effects with bonus_action sustain cost.
arcane-sword::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE, MOVEMENT, and UTILITY effects.

arcane-sword::movement_or_repositioning.issue: The hovering sword and 20-foot visible reposition are represented as MOVEMENT and utility data.
arcane-sword::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional movement field required for this pass.
arcane-sword::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT teleport placeholder and UTILITY options.

arcane-sword::vision_light_sound.issue: The visible destination spot for sword movement is represented in the utility option and movement description.

arcane-sword::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The detector matched hovering force-sword movement, not travel or planar movement.

arcane-sword::conditional_ending.issue: The phrase 'Until the spell ends' is the normal timed concentration duration for repeat sword actions.
arcane-sword::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by duration and repeat action effects.

conjure-celestial::choice_or_mode.issue: Choosing Healing Light or Searing Light per visible creature is represented as utility options, but runtime lacks a first-class per-target mode choice field.

conjure-celestial::attack_or_save_modifi.issue: The Dexterity save and half-damage outcome for Searing Light are represented by the DAMAGE effect.

conjure-celestial::vision_light_sound.issue: Bright Light in the Cylinder and visible-creature targeting are represented as utility light and targeting/option details.
conjure-celestial::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by UTILITY light and controlOptions.

conjure-celestial::summon_or_controlled_.issue: The conjured Upper Planes spirit manifests as the pillar of light rather than a controlled creature; the mechanical manifestation is represented by area, light, healing, damage, and movement effects.
conjure-celestial::summon_or_controlled_.recommendedTemplateChange: No SUMMONING effect required for this pass.
conjure-celestial::summon_or_controlled_.recommendedJsonChange: No summoned creature runtime data required.

conjure-celestial::travel_or_planar_move.issue: The Upper Planes origin is source flavor for the light manifestation, not travel/planar movement in play.

conjure-celestial::healing_or_restoratio.issue: Healing Light is represented as a HEALING effect with slot-level scaling.

conjure-celestial::object_stats_or_damag.issue: The detector matched Hit Points restored; this is healing, not object stats.

conjure-celestial::conditional_ending.issue: Moving the Cylinder when the caster moves and applying effects when creatures enter/end turn/move into it are represented, but runtime lacks first-class moving area and once-per-turn affected tracking.
conjure-celestial::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add moving area and once-per-turn affected fields.
conjure-celestial::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movingArea and oncePerTurnEffectLimit data.

crown-of-stars::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The bonus-action ranged spell attack is represented by a DAMAGE effect with hit condition and granted action.
crown-of-stars::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE effect and UTILITY grantedActions.

crown-of-stars::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The bonus-action mote attack is represented as an on_caster_action DAMAGE effect and granted action.
crown-of-stars::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE trigger and UTILITY grantedActions.

crown-of-stars::vision_light_sound.issue: Mote-count-dependent bright/dim light is represented as utility light/options, but runtime lacks conditional light radius fields keyed to remaining resource count.
crown-of-stars::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional light fields keyed to resource count.

crown-of-stars::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The detector matched the bonus-action mote attack; this is an attack/resource action, not a ward/alarm trigger.

crown-of-stars::conditional_ending.issue: The spell ends early when the last mote is expended; runtime records this as utility prose but lacks first-class resource-count ending fields.
crown-of-stars::conditional_ending.closedReason: Reused the all_target_instances_expended conditional-ending trigger for the finite mote resource, recorded it in structured markdown, and mapped it to the runtime damage and utility effects with spell scope.

delayed-blast-fireball::choice_or_mode.issue: The chosen point for the bead is represented by targeting and utility options.
delayed-blast-fireball::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.
delayed-blast-fireball::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting and UTILITY controlOptions.

delayed-blast-fireball::attack_or_save_m.issue: The explosion Dexterity save and touch-bead Dexterity save are represented by DAMAGE and utility options.
delayed-blast-fireball::attack_or_save_m.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional save field required for this pass.
delayed-blast-fireball::attack_or_save_m.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE condition and UTILITY options.

delayed-blast-fireball::target_filter_or.issue: Flammable objects not worn or carried start burning; runtime records this as a utility option but lacks object flammability/worn-carried filters.
delayed-blast-fireball::target_filter_or.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object flammability and worn/carried exclusion fields.

delayed-blast-fireball::environmental_ch.issue: Accumulated damage and burning objects are represented in utility/scaling prose, but runtime lacks first-class per-turn damage accumulation and object ignition fields.
delayed-blast-fireball::environmental_ch.recommendedTemplateChange: Add damage accumulation and object ignition fields.
delayed-blast-fireball::environmental_ch.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime accumulatedDamage and objectIgnition data.

delayed-blast-fireball::conditional_endi.issue: The bead explodes when the spell ends, when touch save fails, or when a thrown bead enters a creature space/collides with an object; runtime records this as options but lacks first-class object-triggered ending fields.

delayed-blast-fireball::aftermath_or_mem.issue: The explosion on spell end is represented by the delayed DAMAGE trigger and utility options.
delayed-blast-fireball::aftermath_or_mem.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate aftermath field required for this pass.
delayed-blast-fireball::aftermath_or_mem.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE and UTILITY effects.

divine-word::choice_or_mode.issue: Choosing affected creatures in range is represented by multi-targeting and the spell's utility options.
divine-word::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.

divine-word::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Charisma save is represented by STATUS_CONDITION and MOVEMENT effects.

divine-word::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Planar return is represented as MOVEMENT teleport, but runtime lacks first-class plane-of-origin destination and 24-hour return prevention except by Wish.
divine-word::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar return and return-prevention exception fields.

divine-word::object_stats_or_damageabili.issue: Hit Point threshold effects are represented by separate status effects/options, but runtime lacks first-class HP-threshold branching.
divine-word::object_stats_or_damageabili.recommendedTemplateChange: Add HP-threshold branch fields for condition/death effects.
